flags.label: Private nonprofit associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Bryant & Stratton College-Buffalo are 50% below the private nonprofit associate's-predominant peer median ($32.6k vs $64.7k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Bryant & Stratton College-Buffalo fell 32% between 2021 and 2024 (31.4% → 21.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Bryant & Stratton College-Buffalo fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Bryant & Stratton College-Buffalo rose 23% between 2005 and 2008 (25.0% → 30.7%).
